title: Thinking About Software Sustainably
question: Summarize the central idea of the article 'Thinking About Software Sustainably' in one short sentence.
expected_answer: The article argues that software sustainability means designing systems to endure change across economic, environmental, social, and technical perspectives and that developers should build for maintainability and longevity.
evidence_quote: Sustainability is not just about preserving the environment. That’s only a part of it.

title: State of Managed Kubernetes 2020
question: Summarize the key point of 'State of Managed Kubernetes 2020' in one concise sentence.
expected_answer: The article compares managed Kubernetes offerings (EKS, AKS, GKE) and emphasizes that feature parity has increased, with GKE still strong on automation but others catching up, affecting developer choice.
evidence_quote: the most notable difference from 2019 to now has been the feature parity across the clouds.

title: User Experience Design Process
question: Give a one-sentence summary of the core idea in 'User Experience Design Process'.
expected_answer: The article describes UX design as an iterative, multi-stakeholder process centered on understanding users, research, sketching, design, and continuous evaluation to improve usability and satisfaction.
evidence_quote: User Experience Design (UXD or UED) is the process of enhancing user satisfaction with a product by improving the usability, accessibility, and pleasure provided in the interaction with the product.

title: Use the right words to show the seriousness of COVID-19
question: Summarize the central message of 'Use the right words to show the seriousness of COVID-19' in one sentence.
expected_answer: The article urges reframing common euphemisms about COVID-19 into clearer language that highlights real risks and consequences so society better understands and responds appropriately.
evidence_quote: The conversation about this disease is being hijacked and politicized to put less emphasis on immediate risk to human life.

title: How we initiate point of sale transactions globally
question: Summarize the main idea of 'How we initiate point of sale transactions globally' in one short sentence.
expected_answer: The article explains Adyen’s Terminal API approach—using Nexo protocol and WebSockets—to avoid embedded libraries and enable reliable bidirectional, cloud-routable POS communication.
evidence_quote: we removed our need for libraries and created the Terminal API, adopting the Nexo protocol — a card payment standard that facilitates communication between the cash register and terminal.
